task_objective: Fashion Promo Page & 6-View Fashion Layout - center inspiration with surrounding design views

structural_reference.focus: EXACT garment structural framework - proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, waistline, and overall garment length - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED
structural_reference.role: Provide locked structural blueprint for garment design generation

aesthetic_reference.focus: Color system, fabric texture, pattern or detailing, and overall style tone
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide aesthetic elements to be applied onto the garment structure

workflow.step_1: Analyze Figure 2 inspiration + parse Figure 1 garment structure
workflow.step_2: Generate sketch → render from Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 aesthetics, pixel-precise, NO structural deviation
workflow.step_3: Generate model wearing views + brand campaign, assemble diamond layout with premium atmosphere

outputs.center_inspiration: Figure 2 Inspiration - Original image at center with premium framing & glow. Label: 灵感溯源 INSPIRATION SOURCE
outputs.top_left: Sketch Design - Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 aesthetics sketch. Label: 草图设计 SKETCH
outputs.top_right: Garment Render - High-fidelity render, realistic fabric. Label: 服装渲染 GARMENT RENDER. SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.left_view: Side Profile - Model side view, silhouette & drape emphasis. Label: 侧面效果 SIDE
outputs.right_view: Detail Closeup - Dutch angle collar/detail, texture & craftsmanship. Label: 细节特写 DETAIL
outputs.bottom_campaign: Brand Campaign - Dynamic editorial pose, stylish setting matching Figure 2 mood. Label: 品牌时尚 FASHION CAMPAIGN

output_requirements: Figure 1 structure LOCKED; Figure 2 aesthetics pixel-precise
All wear views garment 100% identical to top_right render
SFW; realistic fabric; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Coherent lighting: garment shadows on body, ambient occlusion at folds, consistent light direction
Premium atmosphere: Figure 2 color gradient bg, glow around center, cinematic vignette, unified color grading, luxury white space, editorial retouching
AI copywriting: Chinese-primary + English-secondary, series poetic title + inspiration analysis + garment spec + DNA mapping (icon-annotated), elegant typography with theme-matching decorative icons
